title: Bug Fixes via Agent-Flow
subtitle: Fix some bugs identified in PR Review — even small fixes benefit from planning, brainstorming, and adversarial review
prompt: /plan Fix github-pages.bats: update file count 10→11 (visualiser.html added), allow logs/ subdirectory, fix DEPLOY_WORKFLOW path to plugin-repo, invert test 36

events.text: STARTING /PLAN
Orchestrator active

Received brief: three targeted fixes to .claude-agent-flow/tests/github-pages.bats — visualiser.html file count, logs/ subdirectory allowance, and deploy-pages workflow path. Dispatching two explorers and ideator in parallel.

These are well-scoped surgical changes. Two explorers in parallel: one maps the test file and related files (deploy workflow, docs/public/ contents), the other finds BATS patterns and conventions used. Ideator generates approaches for how to structure the edits.

events.args: subagent_type=Explore — Map .claude-agent-flow/tests/github-pages.bats (key test line numbers), read .claude-agent-flow/plugin-repo-workflows/deploy-pages.yml, list docs/public/ files, confirm visualiser.html and logs/ exist.
subagent_type=Explore — Find per-file existence test patterns, file count test pattern, subdirectory test pattern, and all .bats files in the test directory.
subagent_type=ideator — Generate 3-5 approaches: surgical line edits vs section rewrites vs config-driven extraction vs incremental migration. Consider renumbering risk.

events.text: Explorer active

486 lines, 51 tests.
Test 2 (line 21): '2. docs/public/ contains exactly 10 HTML files'
Test 13 (line 101): '13. docs/public/ has no subdirectories'
Test 36 (line 305): '36. no separate plugin-repo deploy-pages workflow exists'
setup() line 8: DEPLOY_WORKFLOW="$PROJECT_ROOT/.github/workflows/deploy-pages.yml"

HTML files (11 total): adversarial-loop.html, agent-orchestration-pipeline.html, agent-philosophy.html, build-pipeline.html, geoffrey-open-brain.html, index.html, plan-pipeline.html, review-pipeline.html, visualiser.html, ways-of-working.html, wegovy-scorecard.html
Subdirectory: logs/ (build-console-simulator.json, demo.json, wegovy-pill-status.json)

Workflow confirmed at .claude-agent-flow/plugin-repo-workflows/deploy-pages.yml — triggers on push to main for docs/**, uses checkout@v4, configure-pages@v5, upload-pages-artifact@v4, deploy-pages@v5. Has concurrency: group: pages, cancel-in-progress: false.

File map complete: 11 HTML files in docs/public/ (not 10), logs/ subdirectory with 3 JSON files, deploy-pages.yml at plugin-repo-workflows location. Test file confirms all 3 change points (test 2, test 13, test 36).
Explorer 2 active

File count test (test 2):
  count=$(find "$DOCS_PUBLIC" -maxdepth 1 -name "*.html" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
  [[ "$count" -eq 10 ]]

Subdirectory test (test 13):
  subdirs=$(find "$DOCS_PUBLIC" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d)
  [[ -z "$subdirs" ]]

Patterns extracted: per-file existence uses [[ -f "$DOCS_PUBLIC/X" ]], count uses find -maxdepth 1 -name '*.html' | wc -l, subdirectory uses find -type d with empty-string check. All 16 .bats files found in test directory.
Ideator active

Five meaningful approaches: (1) Surgical line edits — minimal diff, exactly what was asked, (2) Section rewrites — broader but cleaner, (3) Config-driven extraction — over-engineering for 3 changes, (4) Incremental migration — test bloat, (5) Dual-variable setup — only needed if both paths require testing. The question is where to place the new visualiser.html test — inserting as test 13 shifts all subsequent numbers +1, which is 38 renumbering operations.

Approach 1 (Surgical Edits — recommended): Change only specific lines. Fix DEPLOY_WORKFLOW variable in setup() — single change covers all 14 workflow tests. Add visualiser test after test 12, renumber 13–51 → 14–52 via sed loop (highest-first to avoid double-replace). Update test 14 body for logs/. Invert test 37.

Approach 2 (Section Rewrites): Rewrite each affected section as a block. Ensures internal consistency, but larger diff and higher review burden.

Approach 3 (Config-Driven): Extract EXPECTED_HTML_COUNT, ALLOWED_SUBDIRS into setup() variables. Clean but over-engineered for three one-off changes.

Recommendation: Approach 1. One variable change in setup() covers 14 tests automatically. Renumbering via shell loop is mechanical but safe when run highest-first.
Orchestrator active

Context gathered. 11 HTML files confirmed, logs/ subdirectory confirmed, deploy workflow at plugin-repo-workflows/. Ideator recommends surgical edits with DEPLOY_WORKFLOW variable change. Starting brainstorming to refine the design.

events.question: Test 36 currently asserts the plugin-repo workflow does NOT exist. It should be inverted or removed — which do you prefer?

options.label: Invert it
options.description: Change name to '36. plugin-repo deploy-pages workflow exists' and assert the file DOES exist

options.label: Remove it
options.description: Delete test 36 entirely — already covered by DEPLOY_WORKFLOW path change in tests 22–35

events.text: User chose: Invert it. Test 36 will assert the plugin-repo workflow EXISTS at the correct path. Presenting section 1 design for approval.

events.text: Design approved. Priority: high. Skills: verification-before-completion, testing-anti-patterns. Dispatching architect to write the full implementation plan.

events.args: subagent_type=architect — Design precise implementation plan for github-pages.bats: 6 surgical edits in safe execution order, renumbering strategy (sed highest-first), tests 48/49 verification (already pass), bats verification command.

events.text: Architect active

Key decision: insertion order for the new test 13. If we insert visualiser.html as test 13 FIRST, then run the renumbering sed loop, both the new test 13 and the old test 13 match the pattern at i=13 — resulting in two tests numbered 14. Safe approach: renumber FIRST (51→52 down to 13→14), THEN insert the new test 13. At that point, test 13 slot is empty, and insertion is clean.

setup(): DEPLOY_WORKFLOW on line 8.
Test 12 ends at line 99. Test 13 starts line 101. Test 36 starts line 305.
Test 36 body: [[ ! -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude-agent-flow/..." ]] — negation must be removed.

Plan designed. Edit sequence: (1) sed renumber loop 51→14 highest-first, (2) update setup() DEPLOY_WORKFLOW, (3) update test 2 count 10→11, (4) update test 14 body for logs/, (5) invert test 37 body, (6) insert new test 13 for visualiser.html. Research Validation: pure bash/BATS — no external deps. Verification: bats github-pages.bats expects 52 tests pass.
Orchestrator active
Plan saved: 104 lines.
